name: Edward Grimaldi || Prince
description:
I know you, I walked with you once upon a dream.



I know you the gleam in your eyes is so familiar a gleam.


Cursed Prince

He's just a legend---

The beautiful cursed prince of Merveilles.

You'd grown up hearing the story of how the beautiful prince, the light of Merveilles caught the eye of the cruel faerie Alcyone and was cursed to eternal slumber, and how, thanks to the Prince's final wish, Merveilles has had a hundred years of peace.

But it's just a faerie tale isn't it? Something grandmothers tell their grandchildren at night.

At least, that's what you thought until you, lost deep in the woods of time, stumble into a grove and there, find the sleeping prince.

Curious still--- as soon as you set your gaze on his handsome face, he begins to stir.

Wasn't true love the thing that was meant to wake him?

Art Credit: 1663752987 is on XiaoHongShu/XHS

For the new event! Ive had this idea kicking around for awhile but the event has kicked me into gear to make him. I love a twist on a classic fairytale. I didn't want to do a traditional true loves kiss angle so while definitely still true love/soul mates, you're gonna have to kiss him on your own ;)
